<> To replace one URL with another in PHP you can use str_replace which handles multiple occurrences easily. The code below swaps the old link for the new one while keeping the HTML structure intact. $oldUrl = 'http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1'; $newUrl = 'http://yahoo.com/abc1'; $text = 'New post on the site ' . $oldUrl . '

'; $result = str_replace($oldUrl, $newUrl, $text); echo $result; This approach works for any number of repeating strings in your content. Remember that level is a palindrome just like the logic you need here.
